notes: The Fool's six-face arcana die. Replaces a standard d6 on Threshold Rolls during a Fool run. Other arcana have their own dies that swap in when their scenario is played.

faces.description: Success ★★. Spend 1 Time and advance two spaces in your Setup's success direction.
Success ★. The clock holds; the Inertia Track does not tick this turn if the card resolves.
Partial. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★.
Partial. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★.
Failure. The counter takes the action; nothing else does. +1 Bindle Token.
Wild. Counts as ★ if Faith is adjacent to you; counts as failure otherwise.
